reviewChecklist: **`sync-bot.config.json`** — This file is used to configure the sync bot. Please verify that upstream changes have not overwritten your version of this file.
**`.github/workflows/sync-fanout.yml`** — If you have modified the default runtime, please verify that upstream changes have not overwritten your version of this file.

scheduleNote: Edit the cron expression directly in .github/workflows/sync-fanout.yml — GitHub Actions does not support dynamic schedules.
